'''Blanvalet''' is a [[Wikipedia:Germany|German]]-based publishing imprint of [[Random House]]. Since 1999, they are the primary publisher responsible for printing the [[Wikipedia:German language|German]] translations of ''[[Star Wars]]'' novels, or "Romane", as they are called in German, taking over from [[Goldmann Verlag|Goldmann]]. Specifically, Blanvalet publishes adult novels while junior and young adult novels are published by [[Panini Verlag|Panini]]. 

{{Company-stub|real}}
